title: Many Latin Americans вЂ“ especially Protestants вЂ“ see a role for religion in national leadership, identity and laws
summary_en: Majorities in Brazil, Colombia and Peru want leaders who stand up for their religious beliefs. Protestants are especially supportive of Christianity in public life.

title: Religious Radio Across America
summary_en: Almost all U.S. adults live in range of a religious radio station, most commonly Christian radio. Stations tend to broadcast either mostly music or mostly talk.
